flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 17 pp at Nashua Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (30.2% vs 47.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Nashua Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).
